name: hyperv-clean-room
description: Automate safe Windows Hyper-V clean-room provisioning, package lifecycle tests, and evidence collection.

interface.shortDescription: Safe Windows VM lifecycle and package-test automation.
interface.longDescription: Plan, execute, and audit Windows Hyper-V clean-room test environments through typed MCP tools with explicit mutation gates.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this Hyper-V host without making changes.
Plan a clean Windows VM and show every proposed mutation.
Validate a clean-room test profile and evidence package.
